title: Iran warns US to stay out of Hormuz after Trump says US will 'guide' ships
snippet: Ali Abdollahi (Commander of Iran's Khatam al-Anbia Central HQ) warned any foreign military force, particularly the US, will come under attack if it attempts to approach or enter the Strait of Hormuz. Ebrahim Azizi (parliament security/foreign policy committee chair) warned that any US interference in the Hormuz maritime regime would be considered a ceasefire violation. Esmail Baghaei (Foreign Ministry spokesperson) confirmed Iran is reviewing the US counter-proposal to the 14-point plan. Iran characterized Project Freedom as 'piracy' and a 'pretext for escalation.'
tag_reason: Multiple Iranian officials issue coordinated warnings — military (Abdollahi), legislative (Azizi), diplomatic (Baghaei) — showing unified opposition to Project Freedom.
